rulings.Case Title: MARIA GUADALUPE BOJORQUEZ VS. ABM INDUSTRIES, INCORPORATED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion To Quash Subpoenas
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, February 14, 2011, line 2, PLAINTIFF MARIA BOJORQUEZ Motion To Quash Subpoenas. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS IS DENIED. THE PARTIES ARE EXPECTED TO TRY TO ENTER INTO A STIPULATION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER OF THE RECORDS TO PRESENT TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE BY THE DATE OF THE HEARING. IF THEY CAN'T SO STIPULATE, THEY MUST APPEAR ON THE HEARING DATE TO PRESENT THE COURT WITH THEIR PROPOSED PROTECTIVE ORDERS. =(302/LMG)
